name: agyb-aas-saas-launch-revenue
description: Install the "AAS SaaS Launch & Revenue" workflow plugin from Antigravity Awesome Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Launch, price, monetize, measure, and grow SaaS products from MVP to revenue loops.
interface.longDescription: Launch, price, monetize, measure, and grow SaaS products from MVP to revenue loops. Turns scattered startup, pricing, payments, analytics, lifecycle, referral, and SEO skills into one launch-to-revenue workflow. Recommended for: Founders, Product teams, Growth-minded builders. Not for: Enterprise infrastructure-only projects, Pure document generation. Covers SaaS Mvp Launcher, Micro SaaS Launcher, and 8 more skills.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to plan a SaaS launch from MVP scope through pricing, payments, analytics, email, and SEO.
Use this plugin to review this pricing page and activation funnel for revenue opportunities.
Use this plugin to build a launch checklist with referral, email, analytics, and Stripe readiness.
